reviews.comment:
Mas alla de los descuentos
Malisima la atención de los playeros se ponen a charlar y hacer bormas entre ellos mientras esperas a que te atiendan. No vallan pueden estar hasta 20 minutos esperando

(Translated by Google)
Beyond the discounts: The service from the beach attendants is terrible. They chat and joke around while you wait to be served. Don't go; you could be waiting up to 20 minutes.

reviews.comment:
Fui al acá a lavar el motor de mi automóvil dicen sin turno, había estacionando arriba 4 vehículos uno reparando uno se ve q quedó terminado de lavar nadie atendiendo , cómo en todo lugar que no posee supervisor y no les interesa a los empleados trabajar más q lo justo y necesario, un empleado recibiendo a la gente y espantando con" ( no tenemos mas lugar por hoy eran las 12'25pm) una vergüenza q para q eso uno pagué $15000 + adicional casi $25000 por mes ...

(Translated by Google)
I went here to get my car's engine washed. They said no appointment necessary. There were four cars parked upstairs, one being repaired, and one that looked like it had just been washed. No one was attending to anyone, like in any place without a supervisor where the employees aren't interested in doing more than the bare minimum. One employee was greeting people and scaring them off with "(we don't have any more space today)" (it was 12:25 pm). It's a disgrace that you pay $15,000 plus almost $25,000 a month for this...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNabHNyZGtnRRAB

reviews.comment:

También hay lubricentroy oficinas del aca

It's located on Cabildo Avenue, the service is excellent, the space is spacious, and there are many gas pumps.
There's also a lube center and ACA offices.
